title: Our certifications
subtitle: We are committed to the most demanding industry quality standards. Our certifications validate our capacity to manufacture precision components that meet the requirements of the world's leading OEMs.

qualityCommitment.title: Commitment to total quality
qualityCommitment.body: At CEFA, quality is not just a requirement — it is part of our corporate culture. Every component we manufacture goes through rigorous control and verification processes to ensure it meets the most demanding standards.

meta.title: IATF 16949 · ISO 9001 Certifications | CEFA – Automotive Manufacturer
meta.description: IATF 16949, ISO 9001 & ISO 14001 certified. CEFA meets the highest automotive standards in plastic injection moulding: < 10 PPM defect rate, full traceability.
